Article Title: BCCI makes major IPL 2026 schedule change - Here's what's new
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

Watch Sherfane Rutherford reacts after crucial innings in IPL 2026 Sherfane Rutherford reacts after crucial innings in IPL 2026

IPL schedule: What has changed?

IPL 2026: Points table scenario

NEW DELHI: The Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) on Monday revised the IPL 2026 schedule, swapping the dates and venues for matches between Gujarat Titans and Chennai Super Kings due to upcoming municipal corporation elections in Gujarat on April 26.Elections are set to be held not only in Ahmedabad but also across several cities, including Surat, Vadodara, Rajkot, Bhavnagar, Jamnagar, Karamsad-Anand, Gandhidham, Nadiad, Navsari, Porbandar, Mehsana, Morbi, Vapi and Surendranagar. The counting of votes is scheduled for April 28.As per the revised schedule announced by BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia, the afternoon fixture between Gujarat Titans and Chennai Super Kings, initially slated for April 26 at the Narendra Modi Stadium, will now be played in Chennai at the MA Chidambaram Stadium on the same date. The match will continue to start at 3:30 PM IST.As a result, the return fixture - originally scheduled for May 21 in Chennai - will now be hosted in Ahmedabad, while retaining its 7:30 PM IST start time.The rest of the IPL 2026 schedule remains unchanged as the tournament moves into its crucial mid-season phase.“The change has been necessitated in view of the municipal corporation elections in Ahmedabad and other parts of Gujarat scheduled on April 26, 2026,” the BCCI said in a release.Five-time champions Chennai Super Kings will next face Kolkata Knight Riders in Chennai on Tuesday, having opened their account with a 23-run win over Delhi Capitals.Gujarat Titans, meanwhile, have collected four points from four matches and are placed fifth on the table. They will next take on Kolkata Knight Riders in Ahmedabad on Friday.
Article Summary: The board of control for cricket in india (bcci) on monday revised the ipl 2026 schedule. Match between gujarat titans and chennai super kings will now be played in chennai. This is due to upcoming municipal corporation elections in gujarat on april 26. The return fixture - originally scheduled for may 21 in chennai - will now being hosted in ahmedabad.

Article Title: Pacers set the rhythm at Times Internet Half Marathon
Article Text:
.

At the Times Internet Half Marathon, the real momentum of the race wasn’t just created by speed, but by those who mastered control. Pacers - steady, disciplined, and focused - became the silent architects of the course, guiding hundreds of runners towards their goals with precision.In the 10K category, their impact was immediate. Groups of runners moved in rhythm, anchored by pacers like Sonu Kumar and Gaurav Kumar, who held a strong, consistent pace and finished close to their 60-minute targets at 57:30 and 58:30. For many participants, this meant running with clarity instead of pressure. Jitendra Advani, with over a decade of running experience and a strong commitment to promoting fitness within the community, brought leadership and stability to the course. Alongside him, Payal Badlani maintained a well-balanced pace for the 70-minute group, with the duo finishing at 1:09:16 and 1:06:54.The same discipline carried into the 80 and 90-minute groups. Sunil Kumar Johri and Abhay Kohli ensured runners stayed steady through the middle stretch, while Rita Basu and Shalu Dudeja guided participants to strong finishes just under the 90-minute mark. For Shalu, the moment carried deeper meaning - from once starting with recovery walks to now pacing others with over 100 podium finishes behind her.The 21K told a story of endurance and control. Vimal Bhatt and Sanjay Panghal set the tone early, finishing around the 2-hour mark with composed pacing. Pankaj Kumar Tiwari and Sankalp Kant led the 2:15 group with precision, finishing almost in perfect sync at 2:12:00 and 2:11:59.For the 2:30 group, Tauseef Shaikh and Deepak Gupta maintained a steady rhythm across the distance, finishing at 2:25:14 and 2:29:01. Utkarsh Himalaya, relatively new to running, turned consistent effort into the confidence to take on half marathons, finishing strong at 2:43:35. Alongside him, Ruhi Singh’s journey - from individual progress to empowering communities of women runners across cities - added a powerful sense of purpose, as she completed her run in 2:50:31.As the race progressed and fatigue set in, pacers became more than just timekeepers. They became moving anchors - helping runners hold their pace, stay focused, and push through the toughest stretches.At the Times Internet Half Marathon, pacers did not run for recognition. Yet, in every runner who finished stronger, steadier, and closer to their goal, their impact was undeniable - making them the true backbone of the race.
Article Summary: At the times internet half marathon, pacers were the silent architects of the course. Groups of runners moved in rhythm, anchored by pacers like sonu kumar and gaurav kumar. Vimal bhatt and sanjay panghal set the tone early, finishing around the 2-hour mark.

Article Title: The 10K run nobody knew about: The untold story behind DIG BSF Ajeet Kumar Singh's run at Times Internet Half Marathon
Article Text:
.

.

NEW DELHI: The Times Internet Half Marathon has steadily emerged as one of the capital’s prominent fitness events, bringing together thousands of participants from across the country. More than just a race, it serves as a platform promoting health, endurance, and community spirit. With over 17,000 runners taking to the streets of Delhi this year, the marathon reflected a growing awareness around fitness and well-being in urban India.The capability of an individual is often defined by their willpower. A compelling example of this can be seen in the journey of Ajeet Kumar Singh , Deputy Inspector General (DIG), Border Security Force. At 58, and a kidney transplant survivor, he not only attended the Times Internet Half Marathon as the Chief Guest but also participated in the 10-kilometre run, demonstrating resilience and determination. He flagged off the marathon before joining participants at the start line. His decision to run, despite a major medical history that might deter many, reflects a life guided by discipline and mental strength qualities developed over decades of service in the BSF The marathon, held on the roads of Delhi, saw over 17,000 participants come together in a celebration of health and endurance. Runners from diverse backgrounds took part, each carrying personal motivations ranging from fitness goals to individual milestones.Among them, Singh’s presence stood out not for spectacle, but for its quiet message. Despite having reasons that might have held him back, he chose to participate, underlining the importance of resilience in everyday life.Health experts frequently emphasise that physical well-being is closely linked to mental and emotional health. However, in increasingly fast-paced lifestyles, it is often overlooked.Events such as the Times Internet Half Marathon aim to address this by encouraging individuals to prioritise fitness and well-being. Singh’s participation served as a powerful reminder of this message. His story reflects a broader truth that inspiration is most effective when demonstrated through action. In a gathering of thousands, one individual’s resolve had the ability to resonate far beyond the finish line.As the marathon concluded, it left behind more than just numbers and finish times. It reinforced a larger message that resilience is a choice, and that the limits we often accept are rarely the ones that truly define us.
Article Summary: The times internet half marathon saw over 17,000 runners take to the streets of delhi. The marathon reflected a growing awareness around fitness and well-being in urban india. Ajeet kumar singh, 58, a kidney transplant survivor, participated in the 10-kilometre run. His decision to run reflects a life guided by discipline and mental strength.

Article Title: Who is Praful Hinge? 3 wickets in 1 over! SRH debutant who destroyed Rajasthan Royals
Article Text:
Sunrisers Hyderabad's Praful Hinge (AP Photo/Mahesh Kumar A.)

Watch Sherfane Rutherford reacts after crucial innings in IPL 2026 Sherfane Rutherford reacts after crucial innings in IPL 2026

Praful the destroyer: How the wickets fell

NEW DELHI: Who is Praful Hinge? That question quickly started trending after the 24-year-old pacer from Vidarbha rattled Rajasthan Royals ’ top order in Sunrisers Hyderabad’s IPL 2026 clash at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium in Hyderabad. On debut, Hinge tore through the lineup, dismissing Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel and Lhuan-dre Pretorius - all for ducks - to leave RR in deep trouble.Handing Hinge his IPL debut turned out to be a masterstroke for Sunrisers Hyderabad. The young seamer, picked up for Rs 30 lakh at the IPL 2026 auction, had already built a solid reputation in domestic cricket.In 10 first-class matches, he had taken 27 wickets at an average of 26.7, showing his ability to bowl long, disciplined spells. Though relatively new to T20s, he had impressed in his limited opportunities, including a tidy outing alongside Umesh Yadav.Hinge made an immediate impact.He bowled a hard-length delivery that rose slightly. Sooryavanshi tried to pull it aggressively but mistimed the shot. The ball went straight up in the air, and the wicketkeeper settled under it to complete an easy catch.Hinge followed it up with a delivery outside off stump. Jurel tried to defend, but the ball came back in slightly, took the inside edge, and crashed into the stumps.For his third wicket, Hinge bowled a fuller ball that swung away. Pretorius attempted to flick it but couldn’t keep it down. The ball went high in the air, and a fielder in the deep completed a comfortable catch.In the space of just one over, Hinge had reduced Rajasthan Royals to 1/3, announcing himself in stunning fashion on the IPL stage.
Article Summary: Praful hinge took three wickets on his ipl debut for sunrisers hyderabad. The 24-year-old pacer from vidarbha rattled rajasthan royals’ top order. Hinge was picked up for rs 30 lakh at the ipl 2026 auction.

Article Title: IPL 2026 points table after Match 21: Sunrisers Hyderabad jump to 4th; Rajasthan Royals stay top despite loss
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

Watch Prasidh Krishna on GT’s bowling performance Prasidh Krishna on GT’s bowling performance

Position Team Matches Wins Losses No Result Points NRR 1 Rajasthan Royals 5 4 1 0 8 +0.889 2 Punjab Kings 4 3 0 1 7 +0.720 3 Royal Challengers Bengaluru 4 3 1 0 6 +1.148 4 Sunrisers Hyderabad 5 2 3 0 4 +0.576 5 Delhi Capitals 4 2 2 0 4 +0.322 6 Gujarat Titans 4 2 2 0 4 -0.029 7 Lucknow Super Giants 4 2 2 0 4 -0.427 8 Mumbai Indians 4 1 3 0 2 -0.772 9 Chennai Super Kings 4 1 3 0 2 -1.532 10 Kolkata Knight Riders 4 0 3 1 1 -1.315

NEW DELHI: Sunrisers Hyderabad produced a dominant performance to climb to fourth place in the IPL 2026 points table after a commanding 57-run win over Rajasthan Royals at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium in Hyderabad on Monday.Despite winning just two of their five matches so far, SRH have accumulated four points and boast a healthy net run rate of +0.576, which has helped them move into the top half of the standings.Rajasthan Royals, meanwhile, continue to lead the table despite suffering their first defeat of the season.They have played five matches, winning four and losing one, to sit comfortably at the top with eight points. Theey have an impressive net run rate of +0.889.Punjab Kings are placed second with seven points from four matches, having won three games while one ended in no result. Their net run rate of +0.720 highlights their consistency so far.Royal Challengers Bengaluru occupy the third spot with six points from four games, including three wins and one loss, and they have the best net run rate in the league at +1.148.In the mid-table battle, Delhi Capitals are fifth with four points from four matches and a net run rate of +0.322.Gujarat Titans also have four points but are sixth due to an inferior net run rate of -0.029.Lucknow Super Giants sit seventh with the same number of points but a lower net run rate of -0.427.At the bottom half, Mumbai Indians are eighth with two points from four matches and a net run rate of -0.772.Chennai Super Kings are ninth with two points as well but have struggled significantly, reflected in their net run rate of -1.532.Kolkata Knight Riders remain at the bottom with just one point from four matches, having not registered a win yet and holding a net run rate of -1.315.
Article Summary: Sunrisers hyderabad climb to fourth place in ipl 2026 points table. Rajasthan royals lead the table despite suffering their first defeat of the season. Royal challengers bengaluru occupy the third spot with six points from four games.

According to Asmongold, he had spent $7,000 in dental surgery since being suspended from Twitch in April 2026 due to his teeth problem. The streamer shared that his teeth had beenand the condition had become so bad that he could actually taste it while eating. His time away from streaming ultimately pushed him to finally get treatment.The Twitch ban, which followed controversial on-stream comments, gave him an unexpected break to address long-ignored health issues. After returning, he opened up about the experience and how dramatically things have improved.During his Twitch suspension, Asmongold used the time to undergo major dental treatment costing around $7,000.He explained that he had been postponing the procedure despite worsening symptoms. The break from streaming gave him the opportunity to focus on his health, something he admitted he had been neglecting for a long time.Asmongold needed dental surgery because his teeth had been severely decaying for months.He revealed that the condition had become extreme, saying,He even described being able towhenever he bit down, highlighting just how serious the issue had become before he sought help.Asmongold said the experience was both uncomfortable and eye-opening, especially after living with the issue for so long.According to him, he was managing his dental problems by forming some habits when he streams, like pressing his tooth so that no odor is released. Despite his earlier hesitation around medical procedures, he now feels more comfortable with treatment and even joked that he prefers thefix after seeing the results.The dental surgery had an immediate positive impact on Asmongold’s daily life.He noted that even simple things like eating felt completely different after the procedure. When he was eating food again after the problem, it came as a surprise to him how good food tasted because of his dental problems.

Article Title: Brady Tkachuk Trade Rumors: NHL rumors highlight potential landing spots for Ottawa Senators captain Brady Tkachuk ahead of the offseason
Article Text:
Brady Tkachuk remains central to speculation despite long-term deal and franchise status (Image via Getty Images)

Rumors suggest that Brady Tkachuk could be traded to a potential NHL team during the offseason



Watch Brady Tkachuk's Statement Win: Ottawa Senators Captain's Clutch Performance + Sens D-Corps Thriving Brady Tkachuk's Statement Win: Ottawa Senators Captain's Clutch Performance + Sens D-Corps Thriving

FAQs

When will Brady Tkachuk return to play with the Ottawa Senators following his injury?

When was Brady Tkachuk named as the captain of the Ottawa Senators?

Ottawa Senators captain Brady Tkachuk remains central to speculation despite a long-term deal and franchise status, as NHL rumors have highlighted potential landing spots for the forward of the team. The 26-year-old forward has been a cornerstone of the team since 2021.According to reports, the rumors haven’t died down, and the popular NHL forward has been linked to a surprising NHL organization if he demanded a trade from the Senators.Unfortunately, Brady Tkachuk has recently suffered an injury against the New York Islanders after being struck by a stick during a line change. Although he briefly returned for one more shift, the 26-year-old forward left the game shortly afterward and did not play in the team’s next matchup. Ottawa Senators captain Brady Tkachuk is linked to multiple teams despite a long-term deal and a leadership role. Rumors are beginning to swirl around Brady Tkachuk as the NHL offseason approaches, with speculation suggesting the Ottawa Senators captain could be traded to any potential NHL teams.Tkachuk, widely regarded as the face of the Senators franchise, is under a long-term contract. But recent reports indicate that several NHL teams are closely monitoring his situation in case Ottawa considers a major roster shake-up.According to speculations and insider predictions, teams like the New York Rangers, the Los Angeles Kings, the Detroit Red Wings, and any other prominent NHL teams could be potential landing spots for the star. However, nothing has been confirmed so far.Despite the growing buzz, there is no confirmation that Ottawa is actively shopping for its captain. The Senators' team management also has not publicly indicated any desire to move Tkachuk, and trading a player of this caliber would represent a significant shift in the organization.According to the NHL, Brady Tkachuk has scored 59 points in 60 games with 22 goals and 37 assists in 2025-26. Meanwhile, Senators head coach Travis Green assured that Tkachuk is expected to be ready for the playoffs. Further update suggests that the injury is not serious and that the captain should return to the lineup when it matters most.As for the trade decision, the situation remains speculative. But with the offseason known for its blockbuster moves, Tkachuk’s name is expected to remain at the center of NHL trade chatter.Senators head coach Travis Green assured that Tkachuk is expected to be ready for the playoffs and the captain should return to the lineup soon, possibly in the next game.Brady Tkachuk d was named team captain in 2021. He was drafted fourth overall in the year 2018.
Article Summary: Brady tkachuk remains central to speculation despite long-term deal and franchise status. Rumors suggest that the ottawa senators captain could be traded to a potential nhl team during the offseason. The 26-year-old forward has been a cornerstone of the team since 2021.

Rampaging Rajasthan Royals will aim to cement their top spot when they take on an inconsistent Sunrisers Hyderabad in Monday’s IPL clash.The Royals have been the team to beat this season, winning all four matches with authority. Their dominance has been driven by a destructive opening pair in Yashasvi Jaiswal and young Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who have consistently dismantled attacks in the Powerplay. Dhruv Jurel has provided stability at No. 3, while skipper Riyan Parag’s middle order remains largely untested.The biggest turnaround, however, has come in their bowling. Jofra Archer and Nandre Burger have been incisive up front, with Ravi Bishnoi leading the wickets tally in the middle overs. The addition of Ravindra Jadeja has further strengthened their spin attack.In contrast, SRH have struggled for consistency, losing three of four games. Their hopes hinge on explosive starts from Travis Head and Abhishek Sharma, while Heinrich Klaasen has carried the batting with 184 runs.With bowling issues and the absence of Pat Cummins, SRH face an uphill task and will need a complete performance to halt RR’s momentum.The Hyderabad venue, Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, remains one of the toughest grounds for bowlers in the country. Pitch No. 3, set to host this clash, is a flat, mixed-soil surface where spin has been expensive, conceding at a run rate of 10.91.Pace fares slightly better at 9.41, which could prompt both sides to lean more on their seam options.Conditions will add to the challenge. It promises to be a hot, humid evening, with temperatures hovering in the mid 30s Celsius but feeling significantly warmer due to the high humidity.Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan (c & wk), Heinrich Klaasen, Salil Arora, Aniket Verma, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Harsh Dubey, Shivang Kumar, Harshal Patel, Eshan MalingaImpact Sub: Liam Livingstone/Praful HingeYashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel (wk), Riyan Parag (c), Shimron Hetmyer, Donovan Ferreira, Ravindra Jadeja, Jofra Archer, Nandre Burger, Sandeep Sharma, Ravi BishnoiImpact Sub: Brijesh SharmaMostly sunny and very warm conditions are expected, with the temperature peaking at around 40°C. Skies will remain clear through the night, with the mercury dropping to a low of 26°C.It will be a hot day in Hyderabad with virtually no chance of rain. Conditions are likely to stay mostly clear during match hours, with temperatures easing from around 37°C at toss time to nearly 32°C by the end of play.The SRH vs RR clash will be held at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium in Hyderabad, with the match set to begin at 7:30 PM IST. The game will be broadcast on the Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar.Ishan Kishan (c & wk), Abhishek Sharma, Amit Kumar, Salil Arora, Brydon Carse, Pat Cummins, Harsh Dubey, Krains Fuletra, Travis Head, Praful Hinge, Heinrich Klaasen, Liam Livingstone, Eshan Malinga, Kamindu Mendis, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Harshal Patel, David Payne, Sakib Hussain, Shivam Mavi, Shivang Kumar, Ravichandran Smaran, Onkar Tarmale, Jaydev Unadkat, Aniket Verma, Zeeshan Ansari.Riyan Parag (c), Dhruv Jurel, Donovan Ferreira, Lhuan-Dre Pretorius, Ravi Singh, Aman Perala, Shimron Hetmyer, Shubham Dubey, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Yashasvi Jaiswal, Ravindra Jadeja, Sam Curran, Adam Milne, Brijesh Sharma, Jofra Archer, Kuldeep Sen, Kwena Maphaka, Nandre Burger, Ravi Bishnoi and Sandeep Sharma.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals take on sunrisers hyderabad in ipl clash. Rajasthan have won all four matches so far this season. Royals have been driven by destructive opening pair yashasvi jaiswal and vaibhav sooryavanshi. Srh have struggled for consistency, losing three of four games.

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for LSG in the last-ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals and royal challengers bengaluru, face off in guwahati on friday. Chennai super kings and kolkata knight riders are two winless teams in ipl 2026. Sunrisers hyderabad, mumbai indians, and gujarat titans have opened their account in the standings.

Article Title: Paxton Lynch Injury: Paxton lynch injury update: Former Broncos quarterback suffers season ending knee injury during comeback attempt
Article Text:
Paxton lynch (Image Via Getty)

Paxton Lynch opens up after season ending knee injury during Colorado Spartans comeback attempt

Paxton Lynch was trying to start fresh. After years away from the spotlight, he had returned to football with the Colorado Spartans in the National Arena League. But that comeback did not last long. On Saturday, April 13, 2026, his season came to an end after he suffered a serious knee injury in just his third game.The injury was later confirmed as a torn LCL, which means he will miss the rest of the season. The news came as a big setback for a player who was slowly finding his rhythm again. According to Fox News, the injury happened during game action, cutting short what was meant to be a new chapter in his career.After the injury, Lynch did not hide how he felt. Speaking to The Denver Post, he said, “I was pissed off. And it sucks. I didn’t want it to be like this.” Even with that disappointment, there was also a sense of peace in his words. He said it still felt good to be back on the field and playing football again.Before this, Lynch had a very different journey. He was a first-round pick in the 2016 NFL Draft, selected by the Denver Broncos. At that time, there were high hopes around him. He had also played college football for the Memphis Tigers and showed strong potential.However, things did not go as planned in the NFL. He played only five games with the Broncos before moving between practice squads. His last time on an NFL roster came in 2020 with the Pittsburgh Steelers. After that, his path in football became uncertain.His move to the Colorado Spartans came after team owner Tony Thompson reached out to him in 2025. At first, Lynch was unsure. But later, he agreed to join. Head coach Fred Shaw believed in him and even called him a “true leader,” saying his size and style fit arena football well.On the field, Lynch showed small but positive signs. In three games, he threw three touchdown passes. More importantly, he said he played with a different mindset this time.“I was like, ‘OK, if I play this year in arena football, I’m going to play as Paxton Lynch. I’m going to have full confidence in myself. I don’t really care.’ And that’s what I did,” he said.Even though the injury stopped his season, Lynch said he would still support his team. The Spartans are currently 2-3, and he plans to attend home games if possible.If this turns out to be his final chapter in football, Lynch made it clear he will walk away feeling satisfied, knowing he gave it one more honest try.
Article Summary: Paxton lynch was a first-round pick in the 2016 nfl draft, selected by the denver broncos. He played only five games with the broncos before moving between practice squads. His last time on an nfl roster came in 2020 with the pittsburgh steelers. His move to the colorado spartans came after team owner tony thompson reached out to him in 2025.

Article Title: Monte Carlo Masters: Why did Jannik Sinner mom choose to stay away from the Monte Carlo final during Carlos Alcaraz clash? The real reason explained
Article Text:
Jannik Sinner (Image Via Getty)

Jannik Sinner explains why his mother Siglinde missed Monte-Carlo final during Carlos Alcaraz clash

It was a big day for Jannik Sinner, but behind his win, there was also an emotional story. The Italian star defeated Carlos Alcaraz in the Monte-Carlo Masters final on Sunday, April 12, 2026. He won in straight sets, 7-6(5), 6-3, and lifted his first major title on clay. But while fans saw his father and girlfriend cheering in the stands, one important person was missing his mother, Siglinde. After the match, Sinner shared the reason, and it showed the kind of support he gets from his family, even when they are not physically there.After the win, Sinner spoke honestly about his mother’s absence. He said she was not feeling well the night before and also on the day of the final. Even though she wanted to sit in his box, she chose to stay away.“My mom wasn’t there because she didn’t feel well last night and today too. She wanted to be in the box but in the end she said that it was better for her to be outside.”That decision turned into a quiet sacrifice. She stayed away so she would not feel uncomfortable during the match, and in a way, it helped Sinner stay focused. The result showed on the court. He played with control, handled pressure well in the first set tiebreak, and then took charge in the second.This win also capped off a strong run for the Italian. He came into the tournament with confidence after good performances at Indian Wells and Miami. In Monte-Carlo, he started with a solid win over Ugo Humbert. Then he fought through a tough three-set match against Tomas Machac. After that, he beat Felix Auger-Aliassime and Alexander Zverev before facing Alcaraz in the final. Looking back at his week, Sinner said he was happy with how he improved step by step.“Yes, amazing week. Some great great matches from my side. So very, very happy. I tried to increase my level match after match which I’ve done. So I’m very happy about that and winning my first big title on this surface means also a lot to me. So yeah it was an incredible week.” He also admitted that even he did not expect things to go this well.“I am surprised in a very good way and it of course means a lot to me. I guess I still need a little bit of time to realize what’s happened.” With this win, Sinner moved back to World No.1, going past Alcaraz. His next stop will be the Madrid Open later this month.
Article Summary: Jannik sinner defeated carlos alcaraz in the monte-carlo masters final on sunday, april 12, 2026. He won in straight sets, 7-6(5), 6-3, and lifted his first major title on clay. His mother siglinde missed the match because she was not feeling well.

Article Title: Rueben Bain Jr.: NFL prospect Rueben Bain Jr draft buzz grows as 2024 Miami crash report reveals passenger’s death and dropped citation details
Article Text:
NFL prospect Rueben Bain Jr draft buzz grows as 2024 Miami crash report reveals passenger’s death and dropped citation details (Image via Getty)

Rueben Bain Jr. drove SUV in March 2024 crash involving Destiny Betts and Miami teammates Nyjalik Kelly and Wesley Bissainthe



Watch Rueben Bain Jr. Miami Highlights | 2025 Top Plays Rueben Bain Jr. Miami Highlights | 2025 Top Plays

Rueben Bain Jr.’s strong 2025 season and ACC Defensive Player of the Year award boost his NFL Draft outlook

Rueben Bain Jr. is getting ready for the NFL Draft, where many expect him to be picked early. But a serious off-field story from 2024 is now getting attention again. According to a report by The Read Optional, Bain was driving a car in a crash that later led to the death of a young woman. The accident happened months before his strong college season and comes up now as teams take a closer look at his full background.The crash happened on March 17, 2024, around 4 AM in Miami. Rueben Bain Jr. was driving a 2021 Land Rover SUV. Inside the car were his Miami teammates Nyjalik Kelly, Wesley Bissainthe, and a 22-year-old woman named Destiny Betts.As reported by The Read Optional, Bain’s SUV hit another vehicle from behind. The impact caused the SUV to lose control and crash into multiple concrete barriers. The situation quickly turned serious.Destiny Betts was taken to a trauma center in Miami. She stayed in a coma for nearly three months. Sadly, she passed away on June 13, 2024, due to her injuries.At the time of the crash, Bain was given a citation. However, that ticket was later dropped before Betts passed away. The report also stated that no field sobriety tests were conducted at the scene.Despite the loss, Destiny Betts’ family shared a calm and forgiving message. They called it a “tragic accident” and said they “wish Mr. Bain the best as he continues his life and career.” Their statement showed a lot of strength during a very painful time.While this incident remains part of his story, Rueben Bain Jr. had a powerful season on the field. He became one of the most dangerous defensive players in college football.He finished the 2025 season with 9.5 sacks and close to 60 quarterback pressures. His ability to break through offensive lines made him stand out in big games. Because of this performance, he was named ACC Defensive Player of the Year.Now, as the NFL Draft approaches, Bain is expected to be picked between No. 8 and No. 15. Teams are clearly impressed by his talent and impact on the field.Still, moments like the 2024 accident are part of the full picture teams consider. It shows how both on-field success and off-field events can shape a player’s journey.
Article Summary: Nfl prospect rueben bain jr draft buzz grows as 2024 miami crash report reveals passenger’s death and dropped citation details. Bain was driving a car in a crash that later led to the death of a young woman. Destiny betts was taken to a trauma center in miami and stayed in a coma for nearly three months.

Article Title: Bucky Irving Texans Trade: Tampa Bay Buccaneers $4M running back linked to CJ Stroud’s Houston Texans
Article Text:
Tampa Bay Buccaneers $4M running back linked to CJ Stroud’s Houston Texans (Image via Getty: CJ Stroud and Tampa Bay Buccaneers logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Buccaneers RB Bucky Irving tied to CJ Stroud ’s Texans

Bucky Irving stats



Kenneth Gainwell could be the RB1 in Buccaneers

Bucky Irving comeback via trade with Texans

RB Bucky Irving tradable asset in Tampa Bay after Chris Godwin

Sports Illustrated’s Ethen Hutton suggests an interesting trade package for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and the CJ Stroud-led Houston Texans: the Buccaneers receive a 2026 second-round pick, a 2026 fourth-round pick, and a 2027 second-round pick while the Texans receive solid running back Bucky Irving.Why? Tampa Bay signed Kenneth Gainwell after he achieved career-high records with the Pittsburgh Steelers last season. Irving suffered shoulder and foot injuries, limiting him to just 10 games in 2025.On the other side of the gridiron, Houston released veteran Joe Mixon and parted ways with veteran Nick Chubb. They did sign Detroit Lions top back David Montgomery. But Montgomery may be taking the RB1 spot. RB2 spot will likely be filled by Woody Marks. So, where would Irving fit? Let’s find out.Patrick McGrath of RotoBaller projects Texans 2025 draft pick Woody Marks to take up complementary role in 2026. Houston has newly added Montgomery via trade with Detroit.Marks handled over 230 carries in his rookie campaign, though with reduced workload, he may not see another 200 carries in his Year 2.But Marks may see a boost in his passing game. Montgomery could handle the bulk of carries, and Marks could settle as a third-down receiver. Now, this was an in-house Houston situation; where does Tampa Bay’s Bucky Irving fit here?Sports Illustrated’s Ethen Hutton reports that Mixon missed the entire 2025 season due to injury, while Chubb was “largely inefficient at an inconsistent role.”The Texans may find a long-term solution in Irving. He could be the missing link they need to bring back their 2023 offense. They ranked 12th overall in total offense, averaging 342.4 yards per game.As for Buccaneers RB’s stats: he recorded 173 carries for 588 rushing yards and one touchdown, along with 30 passes on 33 targets for 277 receiving yards and three touchdowns across 10 games in 2025.He received an overall PFF grade of 67.8 for 2025, ranking 43rd among 55 qualified RBs. His PFF rushing grade was 69.2, ranking 49th among others.Ellis Bryn Johnson of FantasyPros suggests that Irving is undersized [5-foot-10, 195-pounder] and has a history of missing games. This could raise concerns about his capability to handle the workload in Tampa Bay.Baker Mayfield’s franchise signed RB and kick turner Kenneth Gainwell, who secured the fourth-most receptions at his position in 2025 [1000-plus yards with Pittsburgh]. If Irving were to miss games, Gainwell could be the primary RB in 2026.If Gainwell becomes RB1, it could leave Houston with even more reason to acquire Irving. However, Montgomery would be the primary RB in Houston. So that would make Irving a breakout star alongside an established, high-end veteran running back? All speculation.Hutton suggests Irving could make a comeback with a trade. Assuming the Buccaneers want to extend him post-2027, the front office would rather save the money and reinvest it in other long-term roster needs.The Oregon alum signed a four-year, $4.75M rookie contract with Tampa Bay in 2024. He is scheduled to earn a $1M base salary while carrying a $1.2M cap hit and a $365K dead cap value in 2026.Jack McKassey of USA Today suggests Irving could be traded on draft day. It could have been veteran wide receiver Chris Godwin, but his large 2026 cap hit prevents him from being a trade asset.Leaving Irving to be the one likely to be traded. He had an excellent rookie season: 207 carries for 1,122 rushing yards and 8 touchdowns with 47 receptions for 392 receiving yards across 17 games in 2024.But in 2025, he missed 7 games due to injuries and did not return to the same level of production when healthy.The Buccaneers let Rachaad White go in free agency, but they could still strengthen their RB room with another option in the draft. Trading Irving could give them draft picks to help them build their offensive line.So, would the Texans consider this trade package? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Tampa bay buccaneers $4m running back linked to cj stroud’s houston texans. Irving suffered shoulder and foot injuries, limiting him to just 10 games in 2025. Tampa bay signed kenneth gainwell after he achieved career-high records with the pittsburgh steelers.

Article Title: Mcilroy Mom Purse: Rory McIlroy emotional Masters 2026 moment gets fans curious after detail on mom Rosie purse goes viral
Article Text:
Rory McIlroy emotional Masters 2026 moment gets fans curious after detail on mom Rosie purse goes viral (Imager via Getty)

Rory McIlroy wins 2026 Masters as parents Gerry McIlroy and Rosie McIlroy share emotional moment



Fans spot Rosie McIlroy’s purse made from Rory McIlroy’s Grand Slam newspaper story

Rory McIlroy gave fans two moments to talk about at the 2026 Masters. One happened on the course, where he won the title again. The other came off it, when people noticed something special his mom was carrying. While he was busy lifting another green jacket at Augusta National, many watching from home couldn’t stop talking about a small but emotional detail that showed how much this win meant to his family.Rory McIlroy stood strong on a tense Sunday at Augusta National and defended his Masters title. He held off big names like Scottie Scheffler, Tyrrell Hatton, Cameron Young, and Justin Rose to win back-to-back Masters titles, something only a few golfers have ever done.Right after the win, it was not just about golf anymore. His parents, Gerry McIlroy and Rosie McIlroy, were there this time. Last year, they were not present, and Rory had spoken about missing them. This time, they hugged him as he got emotional.During the Butler Cabin interview and later at the trophy ceremony, Rory McIlroy struggled to hold back tears. He said, “I’m so glad that they got to experience this today. We’re all going to have a great time tonight.”He also shared how much their support shaped his journey. “I was a little kid with a dream, and the support that I have from my family, my friends, everyone back home… I can’t thank them all enough for that continued support.”While the celebrations were going on, fans noticed something unique about Rosie McIlroy. She was carrying a custom-made purse. When cameras zoomed in, it looked like the bag was designed using a newspaper print from last year, the one that talked about Rory McIlroy completing his career Grand Slam.That small detail quickly went viral on X. Fans loved it. One user wrote, “This the kinda sports mom I’m tryna be.” Another said, “There is literally nothing not awesome about this.”The moment added another layer to an already emotional day. Rory McIlroy later shared that his parents were unsure about attending this year because they felt their absence last time might have been lucky. He said, “My mum and dad… they weren’t here last year… I had to convince them to come this year… I’m glad we proved that wrong.”This win was even more special because his mother had only seen one of his major wins in person before, back at Hoylake twelve years ago. That made this moment feel full circle.Rory McIlroy ended by thanking them in the most heartfelt way. “You are the most wonderful parents and if I can be half the parent to Poppy that you’ve been to me then I know I’ve done a good job.”
Article Summary: Rory mcilroy defended his masters title at augusta national on sunday. His parents, gerry and rosie, were there for the first time since last year. Fans noticed that rosie was carrying a custom-made purse. The bag was made from a newspaper print from last year's tournament.

Article Title: Scheffler Augusta Decision: Scottie Scheffler reveals Augusta greens decision that changed everything in narrow Masters loss to Rory McIlroy
Article Text:
Scottie Scheffler (Image Via Getty)

Scottie Scheffler explains how Augusta National’s green changes affected his Masters run

Scottie Scheffler came very close to winning the 2026 Masters. He finished second, just one shot behind Rory McIlroy. What made this result stand out was how he fought back. After two rounds, he was 12 shots behind. By Sunday, he had given himself a real chance to win. One putt on the 17th hole could have forced a playoff.But after the round, Scottie Scheffler did not just talk about that missed putt. He pointed to something else. He said he was “a bit surprised” by how the greens were changed between Thursday and Friday. His words were calm, not emotional. He was simply explaining what, in his view, made the biggest difference.Scottie Scheffler started his Masters on Thursday afternoon. The course was firm and fast. Players said it was one of the toughest setups in years. He handled it well and shot two-under 70. That score kept him close to the lead.Then things changed overnight. By Friday morning, the greens were softer and slower. That made scoring easier. But Scheffler, who played early, could not adjust in time. He finished with a two-over 74. He later said, “I’d say Friday probably hurt the most in terms of my chances of winning.”He added, “We went out on Thursday afternoon in some of the most challenging conditions we had all week. Going out on Friday, whatever they did to the greens to soften them up, they did some stuff, and I just wasn’t able to take advantage.”While he struggled, players in the later wave took full advantage. Rory McIlroy made a run with multiple birdies. Others also scored low. That shift pushed Scheffler far down the leaderboard. By the end of Friday, he was 12 shots behind.Still, his weekend was special.On Saturday, he shot 65 with no bogeys. On Sunday, he stayed bogey-free again and shot 68. Across the final 36 holes, he did not drop a single shot. That had not happened at Augusta National since 1942. He made nine birdies and one eagle over those two rounds.Even then, it came down to one moment. On the 17th hole, his putt stopped right at the edge. “The putt on 17 I thought I made,” he said. If it had dropped, the tournament could have gone to a playoff.Scheffler admitted he could have done better earlier. But his point was clear. The way conditions changed between rounds made a real impact. In a tournament decided by one shot, even small decisions matter.
Article Summary: Scottie scheffler came very close to winning the 2026 masters. He finished second, just one shot behind rory mcilroy. One putt on the 17th hole could have forced a playoff. He said he was “a bit surprised’ by how the greens were changed between thursday and friday.

Article Title: Patriots Chiefs Wr Rumors: Mike Vrabel’s New England Patriots linked to $30M Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s New England Patriots linked to $30M Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver (Image via Getty: Mike Vrabel and Kansas City Chiefs logo)

NFL Trade Rumors: Mike Vrabel’s Patriots tied to former Chiefs WR Tyreek Hill

Tyreek Hill injury and recovering timeline



Miami Dolphins wideout could be like Patriots WR Stefon Diggs

Mike Vrabel’s supposed Sedona cheating scandal with top NFL reporter Dianna Russini has led to speculation about Philadelphia Eagles wide receiver A.J. Brown being acquired by the New England Patriots. Why? Because Russini has been covering Brown trade rumors for the longest time now.However, this little WR connection has shifted the focus to a top free agent wideout who has been on the market for an unusually long time: Tyreek Hill. The former Kansas City Chiefs WR has been heavily linked to the Los Angeles Chargers, Baltimore Ravens, San Francisco 49ers, and Buffalo Bills. But lately, it’s the Patriots. How? Let’s find out.Patriots Wire’s Matt Legros suggests that New England needs a volume wideout. So far, Hill has not displayed any signs of being otherwise: playing for the Miami Dolphins last year, the 32-year-old pass catcher went for 21 receptions on 29 targets for 265 receiving yards and one touchdown in just four games.He could have had his seventh 1000-yard season in 2025 had he played in all 17 games. In 2024, he recorded 81 receptions for 959 receiving yards and six touchdowns across 17 games.He did not show any signs of slowing down last season. Like most elite WRs are expected to come out of injuries and return to their best form, the same benefit of the doubt can be given to Hill.The West Alabama alum suffered a brutal knee injury in Week 4 of 2025 during a game against the New York Jets. At the termination of a play, New York DB Malachi Moore grabbed Hill’s leg.Hill’s other leg probably got stuck in the turf, and it led to his twisted fall on the gridiron. He was unable to get up, and his knee looked brutally twisted. He suffered a dislocated knee and tore multiple ligaments, including the ACL.His 2025 season ended prematurely; and according to his recovery timeline, Hill is likely to return by the start of the 2026 season.DraftSharks reports that the Dolphins WR carries a low overall injury risk for the 2026 season. He has a 41 percent chance of injury, a 3.1 percent chance per game, and is projected to miss 0.80 games in 2026. His durability score [ability to produce despite relatively minor injuries] is 5.00 [most durable].He missed 14 games in 2025, but if given the perfect chance to prove himself, he can bounce back [remember his 10.15 seconds track record for 100mt race at California Track Meet in June 2025?].Legros suggests New England could add Hill in free agency because it has assurances behind him in the wide receiver room: Romeo Doubs, Kayshon Boutte, and Mack Hollins.Heavy Sports’ James Dudko suggests that the Miami Dolphins WR could be like Stefon Diggs in New England. The Patriots took a chance on Diggs after he suffered a serious knee injury [torn ACL] in 2024. Come 2025, Diggs took them to a Super Bowl appearance. The same could be expected from Tyreek Hill.Plus, his former team, the Kansas City Chiefs, has been a perennial Super Bowl contender; he even won a Lombardi Trophy with them, so he knows what it takes to be there in the Big Game and win it for his franchise.The 32-year-old may be looking for a Super Bowl contender, and there’s no other like the Patriots at the moment. Someone who just competed in Super Bowl LX.According to Spotrac’s calculated market value, Hill is projected to sign a two-year, $30M contract, giving him an average annual salary of $15.1M.Keeping these pointers in mind and barring A.J. Brown’s strong link to New England, would Mike Vrabel’s franchise sign Hill? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Mike vrabel’s new england patriots linked to $30m kansas city chiefs wide receiver tyreek hill. The 32-year-old suffered a brutal knee injury in week 4 of 2025 during a game against the new york jets. He suffered a dislocated knee and tore multiple ligaments, including the acl.

Article Title: Conor Benn Tattoos: Throwback: When Conor Benn revealed what all his tattoos really say about his mindset and fears, ‘The Destroyer’ tattoos go viral after defeating Regis Prograis
Article Text:
Conor Benn (via Getty)

Conor Benn’s tattoos show his mindset and motivation

Conor Benn is one of the most talked-about boxers right now. The British fighter, known as “The Destroyer,” chased a world title shot. He faced Regis Prograis on Saturday, April 11. Benn is not just known for his aggressive style in the ring. His tattoos grab attention every time he fights. Every tattoo tells a new story. It is about his mindset, beliefs, and personal life.Before his first fight with Chris Eubank Jr in April 2025, Benn opened up about the meaning behind his tattoos. He explained how fear plays a big role in his life. According to him, fear is not real but something created in the mind. This thinking has helped him push harder in training. It has also shaped his strong mentality as he prepares for big fights.Conor Benn has several tattoos that carry deep meaning. One of the most noticeable ones is “Fear is a Lie”. It is written across his neck. He believes fear is just an illusion. In his view, people often worry about things that never actually happen. He feels that giving importance to fear only makes it stronger.Instead, he uses that feeling to push himself harder every day.The boxer shared that he has a fear of losing. However, it drives his training. He explained that while he enjoys winning, the thought of defeat motivates him even more. That fear makes him wake up early and train with full focus. He said he wants to make sure he gives his best so that he never feels he lost because of his own mistakes.Benn also has “The Destroyer” tattooed across his shoulders, showing his fighting identity. The words “Fear God” are inked on his stomach, along with a large cross on his chest, reflecting his faith. He has his initials “CB” as part of his personal brand. One of his most emotional tattoos is dedicated to his son, Eli Clay, whose name is inked near his face. He shared that he wanted his son to always be close to him, even if it meant breaking a promise he once made to his mother about not getting a face tattoo.In tribute to his father and boxing legend Nigel Benn, he also has “like father, like son” tattooed on his bicep.
Article Summary: Conor benn is one of the most talked-about boxers right now. The british fighter, known as ‘the destroyer,’ chased a world title shot. Benn is not just known for his aggressive style in the ring. His tattoos grab attention every time he fights. Every tattoo tells a new story about his mindset, beliefs, and personal life.

Article Title: Dianna Russini Vrabel Affair: “She left receipts everywhere”: Dianna Russini’s controversial remarks on Mike Vrabel deepen alleged affair rumors
Article Text:
Dianna Russini’s controversial remarks on Mike Vrabel deepen alleged affair rumors.(Image via Getty Images)

Dianna Russini’s comments on Mike Vrabel spark outrage amid their alleged affair scandal



Fans are furious at Dianna Russini for her comments on Mike Vrabel as the head coach remains distant



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and The New York Times’ Dianna Russini, remain distant even though their alleged affair rumors have dominated the world in the last few days.Though both of them have strongly denied rumors of an alleged affair, Dianna Russini might have always been a big fan of Mike Vrabel.A few hours ago, a clip from January 2025 of the popular podcast, The Ryen Russillo Podcast ReListenables featuring Dianna Russini, sparked outrage.In the clip, Ryen Russillo said, “You once said to me - I think it’s one of the nicest compliments I’ve ever gotten - that you thought I was a lot like Mike Vrabel”As Ryen Russillo praised the New England Patriots’ head coach, Mike Vrabel, Dianna Russini interrupted him to say, “You should put it on any dating app, that’s a win is someone said you’re a lot like Mike Vrabel…”The popular host added, “I still cant believe Teneesee let this guy go. I think he’s that good at approach…the quarterback situation was challenging, the roster wasnt all that great and they were… that team was not as good as the other AFC teams…”But now, Dianna Russini’s words have sparked outrage among fans as many are convinced that she had been having an alleged affair with Mike Vrabel for a long time.A fan by the username @thebobert wrote, “Man, she left receipts everywhere”, while another fan by the username @DreCrear24 joked, “She was on the pod two weeks ago flirting with Russillo at the end.”A third fan by the username @Rhileztrapsalot posted, “Her adding the dating profile line is just insane”, while another fan by the username @MiamiMarcosJim wrote, “Talk about two careers that could fall in the woods and no one would notice.”A fifth fan by the username @theduke171009 joked, “Good god! How does it keep getting worse? This is starting to look like it belongs on modern love season 3.”However, both Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have maintained their distance from this after denying rumors of a romance brewing between them.For now, Dianna Russini has reportedly been sidelined by The Athletic as the New England Patriots remain silent.
Article Summary: Dianna russini’s controversial remarks on mike vrabel deepen alleged affair rumors. Fans are furious at diannarussini for her comments on the new england patriots’ head coach as the head coach remains distant from her. The new york times reporter has reportedly been sidelined by the athletic.

Article Title: Bengals Giants Trade: NFL Trade Rumors: Cincinnati Bengals could make bold move for $90M New York Giants defensive star amid trade uncertainty
Article Text:
Cincinnati Bengals could make bold move for $90M New York Giants defensive star amid trade uncertainty.(Image via X)

Cincinnati Bengals tipped to make a move on the New York Giants ’ star player, Dexter Lawrence , as he explores trade options

The Cincinnati Bengals recorded a pretty poor performance on the field last season with just 6 wins and 11 losses.Coupled with Joe Burrow being brutally injured, the Cincinnati Bengals failed to qualify in the playoffs for the second season in a row. Ahead of the new season, the Cincinnati Bengals remain focused on fixing their roster.A few hours ago, popular NFL insider, Kay Adams, suggested that the Cincinnati Bengals could explore acquiring the New York Giants’ star player, Dexter Lawrence, after he reportedly requested a trade last week.On the recent edition of “Up & Adams”, Kay Adams said, “This Dexter Lawrence situation — nothing else has really happened, and it’s still somehow up in the air…”The popular NFL insider added, “So here’s what I understand: He demanded a trade last week. Because Bengals, this could be your chance to make a move.”Kay Adams continued, “They still have $20 million in cap space this year. They’re Top 10 in projected cap space next year. Now is the time to use it, especially since you’ve got to think they can land [Lawrence] without giving up a first-round pick…”She added, “There’s no better use for that cap space than on a guy who has consistently been one of the best — if not the best — interior defensive linemen in the league for the last five years.”However, the Cincinnati Bengals have maintained their fair share of distance from the trade talks surrounding Dexter Lawrence.The New York Giants’ star player, Dexter Lawrence, failed to perform well in the 2025 season but he has dominated the field with his performance in the last few seasons.A three time Pro Bowler, Dexter Lawrence battled with an elbow injury in 2025 as he had a half-sack, 31 total tackles, one interception, and four passes defended, across 17 games he played in.In 2024, Dexter Lawrence impressed everyone by recording nine sacks in only 12 games that he played in.Not only was he named to his Pro Bowl for the third time, but Dexter Lawrence was also named to the 2024 NFLPA All-Pro team in 2024.For now, all eyes are on Dexter Lawrence’s comeback to the field in the new season as fans expect him to bounce back while rival teams keep an eye on him.
Article Summary: Cincinnati bengals could make bold move for $90m new york giants defensive star amid trade uncertainty. Cincinnati bengals failed to qualify in the playoffs for the second season in a row. The cincinnati bengals recorded a pretty poor performance on the field last season with just 6 wins and 11 losses.
